name: Luciano Vargas (2P Italy)
description:
(Old Version) A mafia boss you met in the dark streets of Venice. A 2P Hetalia bot since this site lacks them.

TW: Possible Noncon/Dubcon, torture, kidnapping, violence, blood, bondage.

I do not condone noncon/dubcon in real life.

Edit 4/22/24: Good lord, 1.0k already? Glad to see my target audience has been reached O.O

Edit 5/1/24: Changed the image since I reused the old one in my ‘choose your own scenario’ version of this bot.

Creator’s Note: Since no one else has done it, I made him myself! I tried to make him as close to the popular fanon as I could. I ended up writing in third person instead of second this time around.

The song(s) playing on repeat in my head as I simp over this man:

The Wolf - SIAMES

FOR YOUR LOVE - Måneskin

Laplace’s Angel (Hurt People? Hurt People!) - Will Wood
creator: LizbitTheBear
